features.claim: Workflows let users define a reusable, markdown-based sequence of steps that guide the Agent through repetitive tasks such as deploying a service or responding to PR comments.
features.name: Workflows
features.quote: Workflows enable you to define a series of steps to guide the Agent through a repetitive set of tasks, such as deploying a service or responding to PR comments. These Workflows are saved as markdown files, allowing you to have an easy repeatable way to run key processes.

features.claim: Workflows can be scoped globally across all workspaces or limited to a specific workspace.
features.name: Global and Workspace Workflows
features.quote: Click the + Global button to create a new global workflow that can be accessed across all your workspaces, or click the + Workspace button to create a workflow specific to your current workspace.

features.claim: Workflows can invoke other workflows, enabling composable, nested automation sequences.
features.name: Workflow Composition (calling Workflows from within Workflows)
features.quote: You can call other Workflows from within a workflow! For example, /workflow-1 can include instructions like "Call /workflow-2" and "Call /workflow-3".

features.claim: The Agent can automatically generate Workflows from conversation history, eliminating the need to author them manually.
features.name: Agent-Generated Workflows
features.quote: You can also ask Agent to generate Workflows for you! This works particularly well after manually working with Agent through a series of steps since it can use the conversation history to create the Workflow.
